notes: Model strings in requests must include the provider id prefix, for example "openai/gpt-4.1".

providers.name: Alibaba Cloud DashScope
providers.description: Alibaba Cloud's LLM platform offering Qwen and other proprietary models plus a range of open-source and commercial models, with strong support for dialogue, long context, and multimodal use cases.

providers.name: Anthropic
providers.description: Anthropic provides the Claude family of models with a focus on safety, reliability, and long context, for both enterprise and consumer applications.

providers.name: Atlas Cloud
providers.description: Atlas Cloud offers a managed LLM gateway and unified access to multiple models from a single entry point for routing and management.

providers.name: AWS Bedrock
providers.description: Amazon's managed foundation model service aggregating models from Anthropic, Meta, Cohere and others, integrated with AWS identity and access controls.
notes: region defaults to us-east-1; baseUrl can include {region}

providers.name: DeepInfra
providers.description: DeepInfra provides hosted inference for a wide set of open-source models including Llama, Mistral, and Qwen, with pay-as-you-go access.

providers.name: DeepSeek
providers.description: DeepSeek offers its own models such as DeepSeek-V2 and DeepSeek-V3 with strong code and general capabilities, via official cloud inference.

providers.name: Google Gemini
providers.description: Google's Gemini family of multimodal models delivered through AI Studio, supporting dialogue, reasoning, and multimodal input and output.

providers.name: Hugging Face
providers.description: Hugging Face's inference router aggregates open-source and partner models on the platform behind a single entry point for many models.
notes: HF_TOKEN can be used as apiKey when loading from env

providers.name: Tencent Hunyuan
providers.description: Tencent's Hunyuan LLM platform offers proprietary dialogue, multimodal, and code capabilities for enterprises and developers.

providers.name: MiniMax
providers.description: MiniMax provides chat and voice-oriented models including text dialogue, speech synthesis and understanding for consumer and scenario-based applications.

providers.name: Mistral AI
providers.description: Mistral AI offers the Mistral and Mixtral model families with a focus on efficiency and multilingual capability; a leading European LLM provider.

providers.name: Moonshot AI
providers.description: Moonshot AI provides the Kimi family of models with emphasis on long context and dialogue, serving both domestic and international markets.

providers.name: Novita AI
providers.description: Novita AI offers hosted inference across multiple open-source and commercial models from a single platform for easy switching and access.

providers.name: OpenAI Responses
providers.description: OpenAI's Responses product unifies text and tool-calling output for structured and multi-turn tool-use scenarios.

providers.name: OpenAI Chat Completions
providers.description: OpenAI's chat completion product offering GPT-4, GPT-4o and related models for message-based dialogue and completion.

providers.name: OpenRouter
providers.description: OpenRouter is a model routing and aggregation service giving unified access to OpenAI, Anthropic, Google and others with per-model billing.

providers.name: SiliconFlow
providers.description: SiliconFlow provides hosted inference for popular open-source models with low-latency access from nodes aimed at developers and enterprises in the region.

providers.name: Together AI
providers.description: Together AI hosts and serves a variety of open-source LLMs with high-performance inference and elastic scaling for cost-sensitive and customizable model use.

providers.name: Google Cloud Vertex AI
providers.description: Google Cloud Vertex AI delivers Gemini and other foundation models with enterprise features, GCP identity, VPC and audit integration for production use.
notes: privateKey can be passed with escaped newlines (\\n)

providers.name: Volcengine Ark
providers.description: ByteDance's Volcengine Ark LLM platform offers proprietary models such as Doubao plus multimodal and agent capabilities for enterprises and developers.

providers.name: xAI
providers.description: xAI offers the Grok family of models with emphasis on real-time information and reasoning, deeply integrated with the X platform.

providers.name: Xiaomi MiMo
providers.description: Xiaomi's MiMo LLM platform provides proprietary dialogue and multimodal capabilities for the Xiaomi ecosystem and third-party applications.

providers.name: Z.ai
providers.description: Z.ai is Zhipu AI's international brand and platform, offering GLM and related models from global nodes for developers outside the domestic market.

providers.name: Zhipu AI
providers.description: Zhipu AI provides the GLM family of models covering dialogue, code, and multimodal use cases; a leading LLM provider in the region.
